summary: Results-driven full-stack developer with 5+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Proficient in React, Node.js, and cloud technologies. Passionate about delivering clean, maintainable code and mentoring junior developers.

experience.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
bullets: Architected and deployed microservices infrastructure serving 2M+ daily active users
Led migration from monolithic architecture to microservices, reducing deployment time by 60%
Mentored team of 5 junior developers through code reviews and pair programming sessions
Implemented CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions, reducing release cycle from 2 weeks to 2 days

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
bullets: Developed React-based dashboard used by 500+ enterprise clients for real-time analytics
Built RESTful APIs with Node.js/Express handling 10K+ requests per minute
Optimized PostgreSQL queries reducing average response time by 45%
Collaborated with product team to define and implement 20+ feature specifications

experience.title: Junior Web Developer
bullets: Built responsive websites for 15+ clients using React and modern CSS
Integrated third-party APIs including Stripe, SendGrid, and Google Maps
Participated in Agile sprints and daily standups with cross-functional team

projects.name: Open Source Task Manager
projects.description: Full-stack task management app with real-time collaboration features. Built with React, Node.js, Socket.io, and MongoDB. 200+ GitHub stars.

projects.name: ML Price Predictor
projects.description: Machine learning model for predicting housing prices using Python, scikit-learn, and Flask API. Deployed on AWS with 92% accuracy.
